queries.question: Display monthly interest rates and annual percentage rates of bank accounts with a balance of 20,000.
queries.sql:
SELECT Terms.Value 
FROM Terms JOIN Loans ON Terms.LOAN_ID = Loans.LoanID JOIN BankAccounts ON Loans.ForeignKeyAccountNumber = BankAccounts.AccountNumber
WHERE (Terms.Description = "Monthly Interest Rate" OR Terms.Description = "Annual Percentage Rate") AND BankAccounts.CurrentBalance = 20000.0
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?value WHERE {
  ?terms a :Terms .
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?terms p:hasLoans ?loans .
  ?bankaccounts a :Accounts .
  ?loans p:hasBankAccounts_ForeignKeyAccountNumber ?bankaccounts .
  ?terms p:Value ?value .
  ?terms p:Description ?description_w .
  ?terms p:Description ?description_w2 .
  ?bankaccounts p:CurrentBalance ?currentbalance_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?description_w) = "Monthly Interest Rate" || STR(?description_w2) = "Annual Percentage Rate")) && (STR(?currentbalance_w) = "20000" || STR(?currentbalance_w) = "20000.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display monthly interest rates and annual percentage rates of bank accounts with a balance of 20,000.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  low: { SELECT ?value WHERE {
  ?terms a :Terms .
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?terms p:hasLoans ?loans .
  ?bankaccounts a :Accounts .
  ?loans p:hasBankAccounts_ForeignKeyAccountNumber ?bankaccounts .
  ?terms p:Value ?value .
  ?terms p:Description ?description_w .
  ?terms p:Description ?description_w2 .
  ?bankaccounts p:CurrentBalance ?currentbalance_w .
  FILTER((STR(?description_w) = "Monthly Interest Rate" || (STR(?description_w2) = "Annual Percentage Rate" && (STR(?currentbalance_w) = "20000" || STR(?currentbalance_w) = "20000.0"))))
} }
  high: { SELECT ?value WHERE {
  ?terms a :Terms .
  ?loans a :Loans .
  ?terms p:hasLoans ?loans .
  ?bankaccounts a :Accounts .
  ?loans p:hasBankAccounts_ForeignKeyAccountNumber ?bankaccounts .
  ?terms p:Value ?value .
  ?terms p:Description ?description_w .
  ?terms p:Description ?description_w2 .
  ?bankaccounts p:CurrentBalance ?currentbalance_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?description_w) = "Monthly Interest Rate" || STR(?description_w2) = "Annual Percentage Rate")) && (STR(?currentbalance_w) = "20000" || STR(?currentbalance_w) = "20000.0")))
} }
}
